mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_order (order_no, user_id, total_amount, pay_amount, status, address_snapshot) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{payAmount}, #{status}, #{addressSnapshot})
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_no, user_id, total_amount, pay_amount, status, address_snapshot, pay_time, ship_time, complete_time, create_time, update_time FROM t_order WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, order_no, user_id, total_amount, pay_amount, status, address_snapshot, pay_time, ship_time, complete_time, create_time, update_time FROM t_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_order WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_order
AND status = #{status}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_order SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
